title: Head of America’s AI safety agency resigns after three months
summary: Chris Fall’s exit leaves the renamed institute, now the Center for AI Standards and Innovation, without a permanent leader as Washington rethinks how it polices frontier models. The agency’s public posture has been erratic under the current administration.
